tasks.subject: Task 0: init_project writes self-resolving .mcp.json
tasks.description:
**Goal:** init_project.run() registers agentic-graph in the project's .mcp.json with a launchable command (sys.executable), merging not clobbering.

**Files:** mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/init_project.py, mcp-server/tests/test_init_project.py

```json:metadata
{"files":["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/init_project.py","mcp-server/tests/test_init_project.py"],"verifyCommand":"cd mcp-server && .\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m pytest tests/test_init_project.py -q","acceptanceCriteria":[".mcp.json written with mcpServers.agentic-graph","command is sys.executable","args == [-m, agentic_mcp.server]","env.AGENTIC_DB_PATH -> <root>/.agentic/graph.db","existing unrelated server preserved"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: /agentic:init docs reflect registration + reload
tasks.description:
**Goal:** commands/init.md states a .mcp.json is written and the user must reload Claude Code; verify via claude mcp list.

**Files:** commands/init.md

```json:metadata
{"files":["commands/init.md"],"verifyCommand":"manual read","acceptanceCriteria":["doc states .mcp.json registers agentic-graph","instructs restart/reconnect + claude mcp list Connected","stale PATH note replaced"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: stop tracking .mcp.json; generate per-machine
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove repo .mcp.json from VCS, gitignore it, document generating via init.

**Files:** .gitignore, README.md, .mcp.json (git rm --cached)

```json:metadata
{"files":[".gitignore","README.md",".mcp.json"],"verifyCommand":"mcp-server\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m agentic_mcp.init_project --root . ; claude mcp list | Select-String agentic-graph ; git ls-files .mcp.json","acceptanceCriteria":[".mcp.json in .gitignore","not tracked","README install includes generate+reload","fresh init regenerates working config"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: e2e harness stages MCP + UTF-8 decode
tasks.description:
**Goal:** run_claude_headless loads agentic-graph deterministically (--mcp-config) and decodes CLI output as UTF-8.

**Files:** mcp-server/tests/llm_harness.py, mcp-server/tests/test_phase1_e2e.py

```json:metadata
{"files":["mcp-server/tests/llm_harness.py","mcp-server/tests/test_phase1_e2e.py"],"verifyCommand":"cd mcp-server && .\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m pytest tests/test_llm_harness.py::test_claude_headless_roundtrips -m llm -q","acceptanceCriteria":["stage_mcp_config helper","--mcp-config + --strict-mcp-config","encoding=utf-8 errors=replace","each e2e test stages before its call"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: harden harness vs background hangs/orphans
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Prevent claude -p hanging on agent background tasks; reap process tree on timeout.

**Files:** mcp-server/tests/llm_harness.py, mcp-server/tests/test_phase1_e2e.py

```json:metadata
{"files":["mcp-server/tests/llm_harness.py","mcp-server/tests/test_phase1_e2e.py"],"verifyCommand":"cd mcp-server && .\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m pytest tests/test_llm_harness.py::test_kill_tree_tolerates_dead_pid -q","acceptanceCriteria":["prompt foreground-only","TimeoutExpired -> taskkill /F /T /PID","fast unit test for _kill_tree"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: re-run llm gate; xfail stubborn if flaky
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Record post-fix real-agent gate state; xfail stubborn (strict=False) if still non-deterministic.

**Files:** mcp-server/tests/test_phase1_e2e.py (conditional)

```json:metadata
{"files":["mcp-server/tests/test_phase1_e2e.py"],"verifyCommand":"cd mcp-server && .\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m pytest -m llm -q","acceptanceCriteria":["llm gate run; outcomes in commit msg","mixed + contrarian pass un-xfailed","stubborn passes or xfail strict=False citing plan"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: dogfood Retros + correct README status
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Log connection/integration defects via log_retro; correct README to match reality.

**Files:** README.md; graph writes via log_retro

```json:metadata
{"files":["README.md"],"verifyCommand":"query_graph type=Retro ; git diff README.md","acceptanceCriteria":["Retro failed_layer=config","Retro failed_layer=test-harness","README notes per-machine .mcp.json + e2e staging"]}
```
